title: format should override quiet for images
body:
quiet was overriding format, but we want format to override quiet
if both the flags are set for buildah images.

Fixes issue https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/425

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: I think we should conflict the options, so that users know that quiet does not work with format.

:pushpin: Commit 34c25f1 has been approved by `rhatdan`
